name: Almond Mushroom Pate
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor with a metal blade, process the onion and garlic in on-off bursts until coarsely chopped. Set aside.
2. Process the mushrooms in on-off bursts until coarsely chopped.
3. Melt butter in a medium skillet. Add the processed onion, garlic, and mushroom mixtures, salt, crushed tarragon, and white pepper. Cook, stirring occasionally, until most liquid has evaporated.
4. Reserve 2/3 cup of almonds for garnish. Process the remaining almonds in on-off bursts to coarsely chop them.
5. Process the remaining almonds into a paste. Add the mushroom mixture, dry sherry, and heavy cream. Process until smooth.
6. Add the reserved chopped almonds. Process with additional on-off bursts.
7. Cover and chill.
8. Mound the pate onto a serving plate. Garnish with the reserved almonds, pressing them into the mound so they are in a vertical position. The surface should be mostly covered by the upright almonds.
Makes about 1-1/2 cups.
